title: Silky Chinese Steak Grill
description: An earthy and silky solo-dinner dish featuring a fillet of steak grilled to perfection with low-sodium-friendly seasoning for those watching their sodium intake.
instructions: Place the fillet of steak on a plate and season with salt.
Mix soy sauce, rice vinegar, sugar, minced garlic, ginger, red pepper flakes in a small bowl until well combined. Set aside.
Heat sesame oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add seasoned steak to the pan and cook for about 3-4 minutes on each side or until cooked through (internal temperature should reach at least 145°F).
Once cooked, remove from heat and let rest for 2-3 minutes before slicing thinly across the grain.
Drizzle sauce over steaks and serve warm.
